narrative:
Tuscarawas (precinct in Coshocton County) has 928 registered voters, with 62.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a clear Republican lean of 11.3 percentage points.
